scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @website-markup-tool/proxy & npm run dev --workspace @website-markup-tool/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @website-markup-tool/frontend && npm run build --workspace @website-markup-tool/proxy
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @website-markup-tool/frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace @website-markup-tool/proxy
